## Summary

<!-- One paragraph describing the change. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Patch — bug fix, doc update
- [ ] Minor — new feature, additive
- [ ] Major — breaking change

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck` pass
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] Added a changeset (`pnpm changeset`)
- [ ] Tested against a scratch project (`node bin/ds.mjs init scratch -y --skip-install`)
